SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AnalysisEngine
 
AnalysisProgressListener
 
AnalysisResult
Dynamic container for the investigation state.
AppMain
Main entry point for the PhishWard application.
DatabaseManager
Utility class responsible for managing the JDBC connection to the local SQLite database.
ErrorListener
 
HttpAnalyzer
Component responsible for establishing active HTTP connections to the target.
MainView
Main Graphical User Interface (GUI) for PhishWard.
PhishTankClient
 
PhishWardController
Central controller of the MVC architecture for PhishWard.
RiskLevel
Enumerates the threat levels resulting from the scoring engine.
Rule
Entity (POJO) representing an individual record in the local SQLite database.
RuleType
Defines the categories for local access control lists.
UrlTarget
Immutable data transfer object that processes and isolates the components of the URL entered by the user.
UserHandledError
Immutable event object representing an error that should be notified to the user.
